title: ‘Survivor’ Animated Movie in the Works From Paramount Animation, Jeff Probst to Exec Produce
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

The tribe has spoken — and it wants an animated “Survivor” movie featuring animal contestants.Paramount Animation, in partnership with CBS, is in development on an animated comedy based on CBS’ long-running “Survivor,” with hostJeff Probstexecutive producing.

The official synopsis reads: “Set on a remote and mystical island, animals from all around the globe compete for a once-in-a-lifetime chance to be crowned the sole Survivor.”

“I’m so excited to be teaming up with Paramount Animation to bring you Survivor like you’ve never seen it before…in the animal kingdom!,” Probst wrote onhis Instagram. “This will be an all-out comedy with animals competing for the chance to be crowned the sole Survivor. Let’s go!!!!”

“Setting it in the world of animals give us a whole new playground,” Probst said in his video. “It’s still everything we love about ‘Survivor’ — big personalities, funny characters, surprising alliances, competition, chaos — and of course a lot of heart — but this time, the players aren’t human.”

Jennifer Dodge, who was named president of Paramount Animation in November, oversees the department that recently announced Christmas film “The Naughty List” from Robert Rodriguez. Rodriguez has been developing the concept for more than a decade, based on drawings and stories created with and for his children. Dodge was previously president of “PAW Patrol” producers Spin Master, overseeing development, production and global distribution.

Paramount Animation’s “PAW Patrol: The Dino Movie” releases on Aug. 14.

Hosted by five-time Emmy winner Probst, “Survivor,” from Banijay and Amazon MGM, is currently in production in Fiji for a fall broadcast on CBS. The series made its debut in 2000 and recently concluded its 50th season with the most-watched finale since 2020. In the live finale, New Hampshire native Aubry Bracco was crowned the 50th season Sole Survivor with a $2 million prize.
title_zh: 派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)正在製作《倖存者(Survivor)》動畫電影，傑夫·普羅布斯(Jeff Probst)將擔任執行製作人。
content_zh:
作者：帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)

副編輯

部落已經發聲——它想要一部以動物參賽者為主角的動畫《生存者》(Survivor) 電影。派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)與CBS合作，正在開發一部基於CBS長壽節目《生存者》(Survivor) 的動畫喜劇，主持人傑夫·普羅布斯(Jeff Probst) 擔任執行製作。

官方簡介寫道：“故事設定在一個偏遠而神秘的島嶼上，來自全球的動物們競爭一次千載難逢的機會，爭奪唯一的生存者稱號。”

普羅布斯在他的Instagram上寫道：“我非常興奮能與派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)合作，為大家帶來前所未見的《生存者》(Survivor)…在動物王國中！”他表示：“這將是一部全方位的喜劇，動物們將競爭獲得唯一生存者的稱號。讓我們開始吧！！！”

普羅布斯在他的视频中說：“將故事設定在動物的世界中，給了我們一個全新的遊樂場。這仍然是我們喜愛的《生存者》(Survivor) 一切——大人物、有趣的角色、意外的聯盟、競爭、混亂——當然還有很多感動——但這次，參賽者不是人類。”

珍妮弗·道奇(Jennifer Dodge)於去年11月被任命為派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)總裁，負責最近宣布的聖誕電影《調皮名單》(The Naughty List)，該片由羅伯特·羅德里格茲(Robert Rodriguez)製作。羅德里格茲已經開發這個概念超過十年，靈感來自他與孩子們共同創作的畫作和故事。道奇曾擔任《PAW Patrol》製作公司Spin Master的總裁，負責開發、生產和全球發行。

派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)的《PAW Patrol: The Dino Movie》將於8月14日上映。

《生存者》(Survivor) 由五次艾美獎得主普羅布斯主持，來自Banijay和亞馬遜MGM，目前正在斐濟拍攝，預計於秋季在CBS播出。該系列於2000年首播，最近結束了第50季，並創下自2020年以來收視率最高的決賽。在現場決賽中，來自新罕布什爾州的奧布里·布拉科(Aubry Bracco) 被加冕為第50季的唯一生存者，獲得200萬美元的獎金。
summary_zh:
作者：帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)

副編輯

部落已經發聲——它想要一部以動物參賽者為主角的動畫《生存者》(Survivor) 電影。派拉蒙動畫(Paramount Animation)與CBS合作，正在開發一部基於CBS長壽節目《生存者》(Survivor) 的動畫喜劇，主持人傑夫·普羅布斯(Jeff Probst) 擔任執行製作。
